meta.title: The HB1000 OS Living Portfolio — master seed catalogue
meta.source: hb1000-os/blueprint/gap-scale-to-100-initiatives-comma.md §4 (White-Paper Appendix A ∪ Local-North-Stars index ∪ rescued-concept lineage, deduped — lineage fields win on merge)
meta.headline: You do not have 55 projects. You have ONE operating system and 55 things to run inside it.
meta.nursery_footer: Everything else — the other ~50 initiatives — sits safely in the Nursery, captured and never lost, waiting to be pulled down when there's capacity. That IS the system working: nothing forgotten, nothing forced, one operation finished at a time.

honesty.note: Counts must always be computed from this dataset at render — never asserted. The white-paper math said ≈99 (55 Appendix A deduped + 11 LNS extras + 33 unmerged lineage); the full §4 transcription below yields the node count you can count. Display the real number; never invent a round one.

field_legend.family: A flagship · B operating businesses & ventures · C fleets & personas · D engines & protocols · E frameworks & wisdom · F OS/memory plumbing
field_legend.status: idea | spec'd | partial | built | shipped | operating
field_legend.ring: nursery-unscored | nursery-scored | active | shipped | converged | foundational | closed
field_legend.fork: universal | ruby-red | ruby-red-confirm (Feb-15 rule; Standing Order #2: Ruby Red = Maven/Corner Banker/Pulse ONLY)
field_legend.caller: named Dingo Caller or null — null on an ACTIVE card = orphan alert (computed at render; target 0)
field_legend.score4: real Cloud Butterfly Score H/B/F/W /400 where one exists; null axes = total-only record; absent = unscored (pre-rubric) — render as 'unscored (pre-rubric)', never zero

open_decisions: Timing /100 vs PASS/FAIL gate — Tim's call
Degree Journey as 'Stages of My Life' — pending Tim's confirmation
V14 behaviors — data-model donor only pending Tim's confirmation

nodes.name: Confessions of a Predator Lender → 'Cloud Butterflies' (the book)
